content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Antifection
description: Antifection is an Effervescent grenade mod made by Vladof, introduced in the Fight for Sanctuary add-on for Borderlands 2. It always deals incendiary damage and covers a wide area, making it strongest when clearing packs of unshielded foes, especially human enemies and ground-based creatures.
notes: Its behaviour is comparable to the Fire Bee. A second, unused variant exists with an identical item card but without the extra flame spawns; it is not obtainable through normal play. The red text references Ragnaros from the Warcraft series. The rocket impacts use a smaller version of the Nukem explosion. Can damage allies via friendly fire.

special.description: Always incendiary. Emits a rotating ring of flame while launching explosive fire rockets in all directions that detonate on impact. Red text: By fire be purged!
special.title: By fire be purged!
